ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., SGD, SVM, KNN) */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was added to the platform */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the algorithm's details were updated */,
  "creator_user_id" INTEGER /* User who added the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_creator_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "rank_original" REAL /* Rank of the algorithm in original dataset */,
  "rank_smote" REAL /* Rank in SMOTE dataset */,
  "rank_smote_svm" REAL /* Rank in SMOTE with SVM */,
  "rank_borderline1" REAL /* Rank in Borderline 1 dataset */,
  "rank_borderline2" REAL /* Rank in Borderline 2 dataset */,
  "rank_geometric_smote" REAL /* Rank in Geometric SMOTE dataset */,
  "rank_delaunay" REAL /* Rank in Delaunay dataset */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metrics */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy score */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the algorithm */,
  "inference_time" REAL /* Time taken for inference */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during training and inference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_uploads ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric being ranked */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., SMOTE, Delaunay) */,
  "value" REAL /* The value of the ranking */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was evaluated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for ranking */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_uploads ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, comparison, historical) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "algorithm_ids" TEXT /* List of algorithm IDs included in the report */,
  "dataset_ids" TEXT /* List of dataset IDs included in the report */,
  "shared_with_user_ids" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded dataset file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded dataset file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded dataset file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., uploaded, processed, failed) */,
  "processing_details" TEXT /* Details of the dataset processing (e.g., errors, warnings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
